name: ogcode
desc: The token-efficient agentic coding workbench. Built for a future where every token counts — it optimizes token usage at the agent-loop level, saving 70%+ on lo…
descFull: The token-efficient agentic coding workbench. Built for a future where every token counts — it optimizes token usage at the agent-loop level, saving 70%+ on long sessions, while planning, remembering your codebase, and shipping features in parallel from a single self-hosted binary.
